title: helichrysum conicum
intro: Helichrysum conicum, also known as the dwarf curry plant or mountain curry plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum conicum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. This plant has been traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues. The essential oil extracted from the leaves of Helichrysum conicum has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in aromatherapy and natural medicine.
